entries.name: Recovery capability
entries.essence: Returning to functional state after failure

entries.essence: Avoiding damage to people or systems

entries.name: Accessibility
entries.essence: Available to all users including those with limitations

entries.essence: Handling growth without proportional resource increase

entries.essence: Feeling like single whole not collection of parts
